name: clear-pr
description: Write PR titles and descriptions in anandyandawang's house style. Title: a lowercase imperative summary, like a commit subject (no ticket prefix). Body: a single `## Summary` section, 25-100 words (fewer is better), in at least two paragraphs — one on the current state of things ("Currently, …"), one on what this PR does ("This PR introduces …"). Written in as simple, plain and natural English as possible — no fluff — with backticks/code used sparingly, only for particularly important files, flowing naturally in the sentence. Applies automatically whenever Claude opens a pull request or drafts a PR description; invoke /clear-pr to apply the format on demand.
